THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRATHWAITE, AKIRA ELCANIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, ALICE $2,305.23 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,395.23, THIS AMOUNT OF SECURITY DEPOSIT AFTER CORRECT DEDUCTIONS FOR UNPAID RENT AND OTHER CREDIT IN ACCORDANCE WITH LETTER OF MAY-20-2019 FROM MS. LAM. NO SANCTIONS FOR LATE ATTEMPTED RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. ALICE LAM SHOULD STOP PAYMENT OF CHECKS FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER THESE AMOUNTS BY JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
